items.title: Tesla crushes delivery estimates, giving its stock a boost
items.description: The automaker shipped 480,126 EVs to consumers last quarter, much more than even bullish analysts projected.

items.title: Nvidia is betting on a trillion-dollar robotics boom. Here is the hidden way to trade it.
items.description: CEO Jensen Huang has called humanoid robots a “multitrillion-dollar economic opportunity.”

items.title: Opening a ‘Trump account’ for your children? Here is the risk you need to reckon with first.
items.description: The new accounts ban bonds and international stocks, forcing parents to bet their children’s financial future entirely on U.S. equities.

items.title: This fund manager bought Nvidia and SK Hynix and sold software before others. His simple message on AI: ‘Follow the money.’
items.description: Blue Whale Growth Fund manager exited software stocks before many others did.

items.title: ‘I don’t think I’ll make it to 80’: I’m 70 and single. Do I take out a reverse mortgage or a home-equity agreement?
‘She wants him gone’: My friend took in a homeless man as a caretaker. After 10 years, how can she evict him?
items.description: “He lived rent-free, helping her with health-related issues and other tasks.”

items.title: I’m a 35-year-old American living in Japan. How can I build long-term wealth without a 401(k) or Roth IRA?
items.description: “Some financial institutions limit services for customers with foreign addresses.”

items.title: Want to live longer in retirement? This one money move could add years to your life.
items.description: A secure retirement portfolio acts like a health shield, calming market anxiety that can actually shorten  life expectancy.

items.title: Is the stock market open tomorrow, or will it close early for the Fourth of July?
items.description: Since Independence Day falls on Saturday this year, here’s what to know about trading hours and mail delivery

items.title: ‘We are more likely to be living in poverty’: Social Security is a lifeline for women, so why are we ignored?
items.description: “We are more likely to live longer, to live alone and to be caregivers.”
